name: The Prepper
power: Start with 2 Survival cards instead of 1.
weakness: Lose 1 Influence whenever a Scandal card targets you directly.

name: The Influencer
power: Once per game, turn any Influence loss into an equal Influence gain.
weakness: Lose 1 extra Sanity from Scandal cards.
flavor: Your ring light is emergency equipment.

name: The Crypto Bro
power: When you gain Money from a card, gain +1 extra Money.
weakness: When Market collapses, lose 1 extra Money.
flavor: You are either early or ruined. Often both.

name: The Remote Worker
power: Ignore the first Pandemic Panic penalty that hits you.
weakness: Tech Leap spaces force you to choose Influence over movement.
flavor: Your commute is twelve steps and an existential crisis.

name: The Activist
power: When Control rises, you may gain 1 Influence once per round.
weakness: When Panic collapses, lose 1 extra Sanity.
flavor: You cannot log off because the timeline needs you.

name: The Normie
power: Once per game, reroll the die or redraw a card.
flavor: You just wanted groceries and a normal decade.
